title: Fix scheduler and other non-deterministic tests

features.name: conditional null check with side effect function call
features.description: Code should include a conditional expression combining a null or object check with a function call that has observable side effects, where short-circuit evaluation would skip the function call

features.name: logical operator on function returning integral type
features.description: Code should include a logical AND or OR operator applied to an expression involving a function call that returns an integral type, where operator precedence may cause incorrect code generation
